_comment: Test inputs for the recon agent / Maestro process. `context` holds the process policy (vendor master, ceilings, SLOs) — set these as Maestro process variables. Each case under `cases` is one agent run; feed invoice_text/po/receipt as the agent's input arguments.

golden.invoice_text:
INVOICE
Vendor: Acme Supplies (V-1042)
Currency: USD
Line items:
  A1  Widget assembly ......  1,200.00
  B2  Gadget kit ...........  3,000.00
TOTAL DUE: USD 4,200.00

seam1_corruption.note: Printed TOTAL (5,400) is transposed and does not equal the line-item sum (4,200). A faithful agent extracts the printed total; the robot would post 5,400. SeamProof catches it at the agent->robot seam.
seam1_corruption.invoice_text:
INVOICE
Vendor: Acme Supplies (V-1042)
Currency: USD
Line items:
  A1  Widget assembly ......  1,200.00
  B2  Gadget kit ...........  3,000.00
TOTAL DUE: USD 5,400.00

seam2_near_ceiling.note: Amount 9,950 sits in the human-review band (9,000-10,000). If the routing gateway is (mis)configured to use only the hard ceiling (10,000), this auto-posts around the human approval policy required. SeamProof knows the review floor is 9,000 and fails the gate.
seam2_near_ceiling.invoice_text:
INVOICE
Vendor: Northwind Traders (V-2001)
Currency: USD
Line items:
  E5  Server rack ..........  4,950.00
  F6  Network switch .......  5,000.00
TOTAL DUE: USD 9,950.00
